chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَيْدِ الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا تَجِبُ فِيهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Hunt of the Al-Harram and what expiation is Obligated with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/96)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/96)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رَجُلٌ قَتَلَ أَسَداً فِي الْحَرَمِ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ كَبْشٌ يَذْبَحُهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al barqy, from Dawood Bin Abu Yazeed Al Attar, from Abu Saeed Al Mukary who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A man kills a lion inside the Al-Harram?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him would be a ram to slaughter’.
en.sarwar: 26. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Barqiy from Dawud ibn abu Yazid al-‘Attar from abu Sa‘id al-Mukariy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who kills a lion in al-Haram (the sacred area). He (the Imam) said, ’He owes one ram.’”
